ddls:
CREATE TABLE "field_trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "plot_number" INTEGER /* Plot number where the trial is conducted */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the treatment applied in the trial */,
  "stage" TEXT /* Growth stage of the crop during the trial */,
  "k_rate_lbac" REAL /* K rate in lb/ac for the trial */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which the trial was conducted */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil used in the trial */,
  "trial_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trial */,
  "trial_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_field_trials_stage FOREIGN KEY ("stage") REFERENCES growth_stages ("stage_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_field_trials_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment (e.g., Fertilizer Type A) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment applied */,
  "treatment_category" TEXT /* Category of the treatment (e.g., fertilizer, irrigation) */,
  "treatment_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the treatment (e.g., NPK fertilizer, drip irrigation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "growth_stages" (
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each growth stage */,
  "stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the growth stage (e.g., R4) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the growth stage */,
  "stage_order" INTEGER /* Order of the growth stage in the crop development cycle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding trial */,
  "a1_kpct" REAL /* A1 K percentage */,
  "o2_kpct" REAL /* O2 K percentage */,
  "s1_kpct" REAL /* S1 K percentage */,
  "w1_kpct" REAL /* W1 K percentage */,
  "yield" REAL /* Yield of the crop */,
  "yield_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the yield */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES field_trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plots" (
  "plot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plot */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the plot */,
  "size_acres" REAL /* Size of the plot in acres */,
  "plot_type" TEXT /* Type of plot (e.g., control, test) */,
  "soil_moisture_level" TEXT /* Level of soil moisture in the plot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., agronomist, technician) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "location_coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the location (e.g., latitude, longitude) */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial being accessed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the trial */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the trial was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the trial was accessed */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_access_logs_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES field_trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the note is associated with */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the note */,
  "note" TEXT /* Content of the note */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the note was created */,
  "note_title" TEXT /* Title of the note */,
  "note_tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_notes_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES field_trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_notes_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plot_soil_samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each soil sample */,
  "plot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plot the sample is from */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil in the sample */,
  "soil_pH" REAL /* pH level of the soil */,
  "nutrient_levels" TEXT /* Levels of various nutrients in the soil */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plot_soil_samples_plot_id FOREIGN KEY ("plot_id") REFERENCES plots ("plot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_inputs" (
  "input_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each input */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment the input is for */,
  "input_type" TEXT /* Type of input (e.g., fertilizer, pesticide) */,
  "input_quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the input used */,
  "input_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the input */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("input_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_inputs_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the image is from */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_caption" TEXT /* Caption for the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_images_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES field_trials ("trial_id")
)
